domain: Slovak fujara (UNESCO ICH 2005/2008): 160-200 cm long contrabass overtone fipple flute; 3 tone holes lower body; fipple at top + vzduchovod air-channel separate parallel pipe; very high aspect ratio (length:diameter) enables overtone-rich playing; melody played entirely via overtones (2nd, 3rd, 4th harmonics) — fundamental rarely used; shepherd communication across alpine slopes in central Slovakia
specific_mechanism: FUJARA-OVERTONE-ONLY-NULL-SPACE-LORA: null-space-LoRA restricted to K-overtone subspace + vzduchovod fixed pre-projection + alpine-long-range objective. (1) Identify fundamental-capability subspace F = span of top-k singular directions of pre-trained weight matrices (analog of fundamental tone never played). (2) Force LoRA updates into overtone subspace O = N(F^T) = null-space of fundamental (every update orthogonal to fundamental — preserves prior knowledge). (3) Within O, restrict updates to discrete K-overtone direction grid (K=4 analog of 2nd-3rd-4th-5th overtones via 3 holes) — each direction o_k is a principal direction in O aligned to a known capability-region. (4) Vzduchovod fixed pre-projection P_vz: every update Delta is first transformed Delta' = P_vz Delta where P_vz is a fixed orthogonal matrix that 'voices' overtone structure (mimics fujara air-channel that excites overtones). (5) Alpine-long-range structural-bias objective: training loss biases overtone directions that correspond to long-range structural features (cross-position attention extending beyond 1024 tokens) — analog of long-distance shepherd signal. (6) Differs from R414 + R427 + R441 + R453 + R469 + R478 SUTARTINES-DIAPHONY-NULL (orthogonal LoRA + Stiefel diaphony, no discrete K-overtone + no vzduchovod pre-proj) and R503 DOINA-MELISMA-RUBATO-NULL (continuous-time rubato, no discrete K + no pre-projection) by discrete K-overtone direction grid + vzduchovod fixed orthogonal pre-projection + alpine-long-range structural-bias objective.
llm_application: FUJARA-OVERTONE-ONLY-NULL-SPACE-LORA null-space-LoRA forced into K-discrete overtone direction grid (K=4 principal directions in null-space of fundamental-capability) + vzduchovod P_vz fixed orthogonal pre-projection 'voicing' updates + alpine-long-range structural-bias training objective biasing long-cross-position attention features. Differs from R414 KAREN-WEFT. R427 ULI. R441 BOGOLAN. R453 SLACK. R469 ORTHO-LORA. R478 SUTARTINES-DIAPHONY-NULL (closest — orthogonal LoRA + Stiefel, no K-discrete grid + no pre-proj). R491 STOMP-RING-NULL-CCW. R503 DOINA-MELISMA-RUBATO-NULL (closest — continuous-time rubato, no discrete K + no pre-proj). Differs from SC-LoRA 2505.23724 + OPLoRA 2510.13003 + GuardSpace 2510.14301 + PSOFT 2505.11235 by discrete K-overtone direction grid + vzduchovod fixed pre-projection + alpine-long-range objective. Differs by DISCRETE K-OVERTONE GRID + VZDUCHOVOD PRE-PROJECTION + ALPINE-LONG-RANGE OBJECTIVE.
novelty_claim: SC-LoRA + OPLoRA + GuardSpace + PSOFT + orthogonal-subspace-LoRA literature cover null-space-LoRA + safety-preservation space. FUJARA-OVERTONE-ONLY-NULL-SPACE-LORA adds (a) discrete K-overtone direction grid restriction + (b) vzduchovod fixed orthogonal pre-projection + (c) alpine-long-range structural-bias training objective. Recombination — borderline lookup.
content_words: overtone subspace null-space-LoRA orthogonal to fundamental-capability
discrete K-overtone direction grid 3-hole diatonic equivalent
vzduchovod fixed pre-projection P_vz voicing overtone structure
